nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Holy One of Israel, “Since you have rejected this word And have put your trust in oppression and guile, and have relied on them,

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Holy One of Israel, “Because you despise this word and trust in oppression and perverseness and rely on them,

cnv.text: 因此，以色列的聖者這樣說： “因為你們棄絕了這話， 反而信賴欺壓和乖僻的手段，更以此為倚靠，

ccb.text: 因此，以色列的圣者说， ‘因为你们藐视我的话， 依仗欺压之能和诡诈之术，

csbs.text: 因此，以色列的圣者如此说： “因为你们厌弃了这话， 依靠欺压和邪僻，以它们为依赖；
